ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., TROW) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stock is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock on the given date */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the stock price record (for intraday data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "average" REAL /* Average price of the stock on the given date */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum price of the stock on the given date */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price of the stock on the given date */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the stock price */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the statistics (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_open_stats" (
  "open_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opening price statistical record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "average" REAL /* Average opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the opening price */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the statistics (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_open_stats_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_high_stats" (
  "high_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each high price statistical record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "average" REAL /* Average high price of the stock on the given date */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum high price of the stock on the given date */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum high price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of high price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in high price of the stock on the given date */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the high price */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the statistics (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("high_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_high_stats_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_low_stats" (
  "low_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each low price statistical record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "average" REAL /* Average low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the low price */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the statistics (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("low_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_low_stats_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_close_stats" (
  "close_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each closing price statistical record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "average" REAL /* Average closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the closing price */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the statistics (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("close_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_close_stats_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_volume_stats" (
  "volume_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume statistical record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "average" INTEGER /* Average trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "max" INTEGER /* Maximum trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "volatility" INTEGER /* Volatility of trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "std_dev" INTEGER /* Standard deviation of the trading volume */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the statistics (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_volume_stats_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being predicted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock on the given date */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "predicted_time" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error of the model */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "model_prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being made */,
  "predicted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id")
)
